rationale: The cited paper is a prominent empirical sharing-economy study (Airbnb’s impact on hotels), and the citing paper explicitly positions itself as moving beyond prior national-level sharing-economy analyses, so it could be a meaningful prior-work anchor rather than a trivial mention. However, the available evidence is only a DOI-level reference match with no in-text citation context, and the two papers differ substantially in outcome and method (hotel-competition DiD vs. spatial two-sided adoption hazards).
